# multimodal_rag_application Guidelines

Read these docs before making changes; each owns a different concern:

- [PRODUCT.md](../PRODUCT.md) - what the product is: vision, capabilities, scope, success criteria.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) - system design: services, data flow, and the canonical data/storage tier.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) - setup, coding conventions, and the PR checklist.
- [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) - security policy, secrets handling, and vulnerability reporting.
- [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) - the operating manual: commands, repo layout, env var names, gotchas, and the self-documentation protocol (section 15).
- [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) - the agent-team spec: roster, orchestration graph, and tools.

If any of these docs conflict with the code, the code is ground truth - update the doc in the same change. Never write secrets or env var values into docs; names only. Use single hyphens, never em dashes, and no emojis.
